# Test audio-list command validation
# The audio-list command lists all audio overviews for a notebook with status
# Requires: <notebook-id>

# === AUDIO-LIST COMMAND ===
# Test audio-list without arguments (should fail with usage)
! exec ./nlm_test audio-list
stderr 'usage: nlm audio-list <notebook-id>'
! stderr 'panic'

# Test audio-list with too many arguments (should fail with usage)
! exec ./nlm_test audio-list notebook123 extra
stderr 'usage: nlm audio-list <notebook-id>'
! stderr 'panic'

# Test audio-list without authentication (should fail)
! exec ./nlm_test audio-list notebook123
stderr 'Authentication required'
! stderr 'panic'
